from __future__ import annotations


class GodClassPositive:
    def parse_order(self, raw: str) -> dict[str, str]:
        key, value = raw.split("=", 1)
        return {key: value}

    def validate_user(self, user_id: str) -> bool:
        return user_id.isdigit()

    def persist(self, row: dict[str, str]) -> str:
        return f"saved:{row}"

    def render(self, row: dict[str, str]) -> str:
        return f"<div>{row}</div>"

    def send_email(self, email: str) -> str:
        return f"sent:{email}"
